title: Theopsis transarisanensis

The genus Theopsis is a part of the broader flowering plant clade Asteridae. The species is primarily found in the mountainous regions of Asia. intro: Theopsis transarisanensis, also known as Korean mountain tea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Theopsis transarisanensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, such as theobromine and theophylline, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Korean mountain tea include teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to promote relaxation, improve mental clarity, and support overall well-being.
